subcodes.first_line: O ye who are intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant in the realm of existence, ye builders of national institutions and promoters of divine teachings and education [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخموران باده میثاق در عالم وجود و تاسیسات ملیه و ترویج تعالیم الهی و تربیت
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @effort; striving, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
